revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] to [[Category:new pages]][[Category:new pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.text:
{{CatTrack}} {{Wikipedia category|hidden=yes}} This category contains all pages labeled with {{tl|Expert}}, and exists primarily for bot-based monitoring of articles needing expert attention. By-topic categories are located in [[:Category:Articles needing expert attention]]. {{filter category by topic}} {{CatAutoTOC}}
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Articles needing expert attention| ]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]] [[Category:Category]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:All articles needing expert attention]][[Category:Category]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:All articles needing expert attention]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]][[en:All articles needing expert attention]][[Category:qq]]

{{CatTrack}} {{Wikipedia category|hidden=yes}} This category contains all pages labeled with {{tl|Expert}}, and exists primarily for bot-based monitoring of articles needing expert attention. By-topic categories are located in [[:Category:Articles needing expert attention]]. {{filter category by topic}} {{CatAutoTOC}}
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Articles needing expert attention| ]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]] [[Category]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:All articles needing expert attention]][[Category]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:All articles needing expert attention]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]][[en:All articles needing expert attention]][[Category:qq]]

By-topic categories are located in [[:Category:Articles needing expert attention]]. {{filter category by topic}} {{CatAutoTOC}}
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Articles needing expert attention| ]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:refreshing redirects]][[Category:11]] [[Category]] [[Category:11]][[Category:11]] [[Category:All articles needing expert attention]][[Category]] [[Category:11]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[en:All articles needing expert attention]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[en:All articles needing expert attention]][[Category:11]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 3 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8235689)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{CatTrack}}
{{Wikipedia category|hidden=yes}}
{{tl|Expert}}
{{filter category by topic}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{wikidata link|Q8235689}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:All articles needing expert attention]]
[[en:Category:All articles needing expert attention]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Articles needing expert attention| ]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] (crud category cleanup) [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22556809750|manual triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=All_articles_needing_expert_attention here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=All_articles_needing_expert_attention for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<!--templates-->
{{CatTrack}}
{{Wikipedia category|hidden=yes}}
{{tl|Expert}}
{{filter category by topic}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{wikidata link|Q8235689}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:All articles needing expert attention]]
[[en:Category:All articles needing expert attention]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Articles needing expert attention| ]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 2 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template (has duplicate-language pairs) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25263326738|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

{{Wikipedia category|hidden=yes}}
{{tl|Expert}}
{{filter category by topic}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
